phases.name: Roots
phases.label: Phase One — Roots
phases.emotional_register: Safe world with visible cracks. The adults know what to do. The player is absorbing.
phases.notes: Tutorial-scale, guided, contained. Set at The Holdfast on Route 117.

phases.name: Pressure
phases.label: Phase Two — Pressure
phases.emotional_register: The emergency is the background of daily life. The player is contributing but not yet leading.
phases.notes: Town-scale, civic, constrained. Slateport coastal volunteer work and Dewford detour.

phases.name: Threshold
phases.label: Phase Three — Threshold
phases.emotional_register: The player is now the one who makes decisions that matter.
phases.notes: Full game, open, consequential. Kyogre/Groudon awakening crisis. TOZ system active. EHI active.
